name: profiles/active.sh applies the later overrides[] entry when two entries match the same file (later wins per §16 E-3)
command:
printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  no-eval: error
overrides:
  - files: ["**/*.ts"]
    rules:
      no-eval: warn
  - files: ["**/*.test.ts"]
    rules:
      no-eval: off
' > p.yaml && mkdir -p tree && printf 'id: no-eval
' > tree/no-eval.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" p.yaml --tree tree --emit-resolved --for-file foo.test.ts 2>out.txt && grep -q '"severity":"false"' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
